listings.description: Charming craftsman home with original hardwood floors, updated kitchen, and a landscaped backyard with mature trees.
Spacious modern home with open floor plan, chef's kitchen, home office, and a two-car garage. Mountain views from the deck.
Updated downtown condo with exposed brick, in-unit laundry, and rooftop access. Walking distance to restaurants and transit.
Executive home on a half-acre lot. Pool, three-car garage, gourmet kitchen, and a finished basement with home theatre.
